title: SupremeVouchers
description: All in one Voucher plugin! Create/Editing vouchers made easy...
body:
<center>

![SupremeVouchers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cc06755f7517c49851a37c9001cd80ba70b7ced_0.webp)

Requires **[NBTAPI](https://modrinth.com/plugin/nbtapi)** To work

**What is SupremeVouchers?**

This plugin allows you to easily create unlimited vouchers with a easy in-game GUI editor.

**What makes this voucher plugin different, from other voucher plugins?**

After dealing with countless voucher plugins that were complicated and missing essential features, I decided to create SupremeVouchers. It’s designed to be intuitive, powerful, and effortless when creating or editing vouchers.

I am always looking to improve the plugin, so if you have any suggestions/ideas please let me know.

**There's an issue/bug where can I report it?**

You can get instant support from my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/AnPwty8asP).
</center>

**Moving from CrazyVouchers?**
1. Remove the CrazyVouchers.jar **file but keep the folder.**
1. run /vouchers merge, it will detect CrazyVouchers and load them all into SupremeVouchers.

**Dependencies:**
  
- NBTAPI
- Vault
- PlaceholderAPI

**Supported Plugins:**

- HeadDatabase (hdb-<id>)
- ItemsAdder (itemsadder-<id>)

<center>
  
Found a bug or have a suggestion?
Join my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/AnPwty8asP) to report.
</center>
